examples: Repair Engineer: Oh, my God! I got it! The magnetron is out of order.
The next morning, Scientist Spencer decided to put the magnetron tube near an egg.
Thus, things turn full circle, for the original microwave oven was based on the magnetron from a military radar.
His laboratory produced the magnetron, an invention that greatly improved the efficiency of radar.
And Percy L. Spencer in 1945 watched a magnetron melt candy, leading to the invention of microwave ovens.
